inputs.name: ariaDescribedby
inputs.description:
Additional IDs to include in aria-describedby attribute
Can be used to reference additional descriptive content

inputs.name: ariaDescription
inputs.description:
card aria-description
Overrides the default translated aria description.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
card aria-label
used when there's no title describing the card

inputs.name: ariaPosinset
inputs.description: value for aria-posinset

inputs.name: ariaRoledescription
inputs.description:
card aria-roledescription
default: 'Card'

inputs.name: ariaSetsize
inputs.description: value for aria-setsize

inputs.name: badge
inputs.description: text for the card badge

inputs.name: badgeAriaLabel
inputs.description:
aria-label for the card badge
Default value: null

inputs.name: badgeColor
inputs.description:
Indication color for the card badge
Possible values: integers from 1 to 10

inputs.name: badgeColorSecondary
inputs.description:
Whether to use secondary set of indication colors for the card badge
Default value: false

inputs.name: badgeIcon
inputs.description: icon/glyph for the card badge

inputs.name: badgeStatus
inputs.description:
Color status for the card badge
Possible values: 'negative' | 'critical' | 'positive' | 'informative' | 'neutral'
Default value: null

inputs.name: cardType
inputs.description:
set the Card type
options: 'object' | 'standard' | 'component' | 'analytical' | 'list' | 'table' | 'quickView' | 'linkList' | 'banner'
default: 'standard'

inputs.name: id
inputs.description:
card id
if not set, a default value is provided

inputs.name: interactive
inputs.description:
whether the card is interactive
default: false

inputs.name: isLoading
inputs.description:
whether the card is in loading state
default: false

inputs.name: role
inputs.description:
card role
default: 'region'

inputs.name: secondBadge
inputs.description: text for the card second badge

inputs.name: secondBadgeAriaLabel
inputs.description:
aria-label for the card second badge
Default value: null

inputs.name: secondBadgeColor
inputs.description:
Indication color for the card second badge
Possible values: integers from 1 to 10

inputs.name: secondBadgeColorSecondary
inputs.description:
Whether to use secondary set of indication colors for the card second badge
Default value: false

inputs.name: secondBadgeIcon
inputs.description: icon/glyph for the card second badge

inputs.name: secondBadgeStatus
inputs.description:
Color status for the card second badge
Possible values: 'negative' | 'critical' | 'positive' | 'informative' | 'neutral'
Default value: null

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description:
whether the card is selected
default: false

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Tab index attribute

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value of the list item.

methods.name: getTabIndex
methods.description:
Get the current tab index.
Returns the internal tab index which may have been modified programmatically.
This getter is a replacement for directly binding to the `tabindex` input, which may not reflect the actual tab index if it was left unset and defaulted to 0 for the first item.
